sentences.target: On attend sa venue avec impatience.

translations.fr: On attend sa venue avec impatience.
translations.en: We’re eagerly waiting for her arrival.
translations.de: Wir warten sehnsüchtig auf ihre Ankunft.
translations.it: Aspettiamo con impazienza il suo arrivo.
translations.ko: 우리는 그녀의 도착을 손꼽아 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正热切地期待她的到来。
translations.ru: Мы с нетерпением ждём её прибытия.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando ansiosamente a chegada dela.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang háo hức chờ đợi cô ấy đến.
translations.nl: We wachten vol verwachting op haar aankomst.
translations.uk: Ми з нетерпінням чекаємо на її прибуття.
translations.hi: हम उसके आने का बेसब्री से इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Z niecierpliwością czekamy na jej przyjazd.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε με ανυπομονησία την άφιξή της.
translations.nb: Vi venter utålmodig på hennes ankomst.
translations.sv: Vi väntar otåligt på hennes ankomst.
translations.da: Vi venter utålmodigt på hendes ankomst.
translations.ja: 彼女の到着を心待ちにしています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; triggers 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting the NP 'sa venue' as object.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees in gender/number (feminine singular) with 'venue'.
Common noun (feminine singular) meaning 'arrival'; head of the direct object NP.
Preposition introducing the manner complement 'impatience'.
Common noun used in a prepositional phrase with 'avec' to express manner.

translations.de: Danke, dass du gestern gekommen bist.
translations.it: Grazie per la tua visita di ieri.
translations.vi: Cảm ơn bạn đã đến hôm qua.
translations.nl: Bedankt dat je gisteren bent gekomen.
translations.nb: Takk for at du kom i går.
translations.sv: Tack för att du kom i går.
translations.da: Tak fordi du kom i går.
translations.ja: 昨日来てくれてありがとう。

tokens.explanation: Interjection/formula expressing gratitude; heads the utterance.
Preposition introducing the reason/complement ('ta venue').
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; feminine singular to agree with 'venue'.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition 'pour'.
Temporal adverb modifying the event time ('ta venue').

sentences.target: La venue du maire est confirmée.

translations.fr: La venue du maire est confirmée.
translations.es: La llegada del alcalde está confirmada.
translations.de: Die Ankunft des Bürgermeisters ist bestätigt.
translations.pt: A chegada do prefeito está confirmada.
translations.vi: Việc thị trưởng đến đã được xác nhận.
translations.nl: De komst van de burgemeester is bevestigd.
translations.hi: महापौर का आगमन पुष्टि किया गया है.
translations.el: Η άφιξη του δημάρχου έχει επιβεβαιωθεί.
translations.ja: 市長の到着が確認されました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'venue'.
Common noun (feminine singular); head of the subject NP.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le'; introduces the nominal complement 'maire' ('of the mayor').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'du' specifying whose arrival.
Auxiliary/copula in present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate.
Past participle (feminine singular) used as passive predicate with 'être'.

sentences.target: Nous préparons sa venue ce soir.

translations.fr: Nous préparons sa venue ce soir.
translations.en: We’re preparing for her arrival tonight.
translations.es: Estamos preparando su llegada esta noche.
translations.de: Wir bereiten uns auf ihre Ankunft heute Abend vor.
translations.it: Stiamo preparando il suo arrivo per stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 그녀의 도착을 준비하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为她今晚的到来做准备。
translations.yue: 我哋正為佢今晚到來做準備。
translations.ru: Мы готовимся к её приезду сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Estamos preparando a chegada dela para esta noite.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chuẩn bị cho cô ấy đến vào tối nay.
translations.nl: We bereiden ons voor op haar komst vanavond.
translations.uk: Ми готуємося до її прибуття сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: हम आज रात उसके आने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Przygotowujemy się na jej przyjazd dziś wieczorem.
translations.el: Ετοιμαζόμαστε για την άφιξή της απόψε.
translations.nb: Vi forbereder oss på hennes ankomst i kveld.
translations.id: Kami sedang menyiapkan kedatangannya malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi förbereder hennes ankomst i kväll.
translations.ro: Ne pregătim pentru sosirea ei diseară.
translations.cs: Připravujeme se na její příjezd dnes večer.
translations.da: Vi forbereder hendes ankomst i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜の彼女の到着に向けて準備しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'sa venue' as object.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; feminine singular modifier of 'venue'.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of 'préparons'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to specify time.
Common noun; temporal NP functioning as an adverbial (time) modifier.

La venue du maire est confirmée.
Nous préparons sa venue ce soir.
fr: On attend sa venue avec impatience.
La venue du maire est confirmée.
Nous préparons sa venue ce soir.
en: We’re eagerly waiting for her arrival.
We’re preparing for her arrival tonight.
